shadows.name: sky-ambient
shadows.purpose: Soft, cheerful ambient drop shadow for editor cards.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #4f46e5; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3730a3; }

components.name: Standard Input Field
components.css: .ds-form-input { width: 100%; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; background: #fafaf9; border: 2px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px; outline: none; color: #0f172a; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-form-input:focus { border-color: #38bdf8; }

narrative.overview: A highly approachable, Canva-like, and flexible workspace that focuses on creative freedom without technical overhead. It provides a hopeful, structured canvas for fosters.
keyCharacteristics: Low-contrast, ambient sky-blue backgrounds for focus
Generous, organic corner rounding (24px on containers)
Accent colors reserved for primary action items and state indications
Dynamic multi-stepper navigation that keeps forms clear and step-based

rules.name: The Accent Isolation Rule
rules.body: The primary Indigo accent is used on <=10% of any screen. Its purpose is to guide focus, not decorate.

rules.name: The Single UI Font Rule
rules.body: All editor controls, step navigation, and system status text use the Inter sans-serif font stack. Special fonts are restricted to poster canvases.

dos: Do use OKLCH color space for styling updates inside the stylesheet.
Do confirm with a confirmation modal guard before executing 'Start Fresh' actions.
donts: Don't use cartoon fonts, bubble shapes, or primary-color overload on the UI chrome.
Don't use dark mode with heavy purple gradients, neon accents, or glassmorphism.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent strip on cards.
